dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.loadingTimeout: Matagal mag-load ang dashboard. I-refresh ang pahina.
dashboard.activationTitle: Mag-refer lang ng 2 Basic na miyembro at mababayaran na ang membership mo
dashboard.activationDesc1: Bilang libreng miyembro, kumikita ka ng
dashboard.activationDesc2: $10 para sa bawat Basic na miyembrong nire-refer
dashboard.andEarned: at kumita ng ${{amount}} sa lahat ng pinagkakakitaan
dashboard.watchGridCommissions: Manood para Kumita + grid na komisyon
dashboard.platformTourDesc: I-tour ang bawat feature at tool na available
dashboard.shareYourLinkDesc: Kopyahin ang referral link at ibahagi para kumita ng 50% komisyon
dashboard.campaignTiersDesc: I-activate ang isang antas para ma-unlock ang grid komisyon
dashboard.compPlanDesc: Unawain kung paano ka kumikita — 5 pinagkakakitaan, 95% ibinabayad sa miyembro
dashboard.analyticsDesc: I-track ang kita, referral, at performance ng kampanya sa real time
dashboard.myNetworkDesc: Panoorin ang team mo na lumalaki — i-track ang referral, antas, at aktibidad
dashboard.noRecentActivity: Wala pang aktibidad. Ibahagi ang link mo para magsimulang kumita!
dashboard.goalShareLink: Ibahagi ang link para sa unang komisyon
dashboard.goalShareLinkDesc: Bawat Basic referral ay kumikita ng ${{commission}}/buwan. {{needed}} referral lang at ang ${{cost}} membership mo ay mababayaran.
dashboard.goal1MoreReferral: 1 referral pa at mababayaran na ang membership
dashboard.goal1MoreDesc: Mayroon kang {{refs}} referral na kumikita ng ${{earning}}/buwan. Isa pa at ang ${{cost}} membership ay covered na.
dashboard.goalNMoreDesc: Mayroon kang {{refs}} referral na kumikita ng ${{earning}}/buwan. {{remaining}} pa at libreng membership.
dashboard.goalEarningMonth: Kumikita ka ng ${{monthly}}/buwan — susunod na target: 10 referral
dashboard.goalEarningMonthDesc: Nabayaran na ang membership, tubo ng ${{profit}}/buwan. Abutin ang 10 referral para sa ${{target}}/buwan.
dashboard.goalGridDesc: Ang {{tierName}} grid mo ay may {{filled}}/{{total}} posisyon. {{remaining}} pa para ma-unlock ang bonus.
dashboard.goalWithdrawDesc: Ang affiliate wallet mo ay may ${{balance}}. Minimum withdrawal $10.
dashboard.goalOneMoreComm: Isang komisyon pa at okay na.
dashboard.goalWatchCompleteDesc: Napanood mo na ang lahat ng {{required}} video ngayon. Qualified ka sa withdrawal. Ire-reset sa hating-gabi.
dashboard.goalWatchNotStarted: Hindi mo pa napapanood ang mga video ngayon
dashboard.goalWatchNowDesc: Kumpletuhin ang araw-araw na panonood para manatiling qualified. Kailangan ng {{required}} video ngayon.
dashboard.goalStartWatchingDesc: Panoorin ang araw-araw na mga video para mapanatili ang karapatang mag-withdraw.

wallet.title: ◎ Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Ang iyong balanse, komisyon, at mga withdrawal
wallet.earnedFromReferralCredits: Kinita mula sa paggamit ng referral credits
wallet.affiliateWalletDesc: Mga referral ng membership, komisyon ng Studio sponsor, benta ng kurso, Pay It Forward.
wallet.requiresActiveTier: Kailangan ng aktibong antas + araw-araw na video
wallet.campaignWalletDesc: Grid komisyon: 40% direktang sponsor, 6.25% uni-level, bonus sa pagkumpleto.
wallet.campaignFeeNote: Min $10 · Bayad $1.00 · Aktibong antas + quota ng panonood kailangan
wallet.noCampaignEarnings: Walang kita sa kampanya. Mag-activate ng antas para magsimula.
wallet.referAndActivate: Mag-refer ng miyembro at i-activate ang grid para magsimulang kumita.
wallet.graceWarning: Hindi sapat ang balanse — mag-top up sa $20 USDT.
wallet.renewalAutoDeducted: $20 pag-renew ay automatic na ibabawas. Basta may laman ang wallet, aktibo ang membership.
wallet.sendFundsDesc: Mag-transfer ng USDT sa kahit na sinong aktibong miyembro gamit ang kanilang ID (hal. SAP-00042). Instant at libre.
wallet.notePlaceholder: hal. Regalo ng membership, hatian ng komisyon...

watch.title: Watch to Earn
watch.watchedAllAvailable: You've watched all {{watched}} available video(s) but your daily quota is {{limit}}. Check back later as new campaigns are added.
watch.watchedAllRequired: You've watched all {{count}} required videos today. Your commissions are fully qualified. Come back tomorrow!
watch.topEarners: Top earners never miss a day.
watch.checkBackSoon: Check back soon — campaigns are added as advertisers activate their tiers.
watch.watchedOfToday: You watched {{watched}} of {{limit}} video(s) today. Your campaign wallet withdrawals are qualified.
watch.missedDays: You've missed {{count}} day(s). Complete today's quota to protect your earnings.
watch.statusReady: ✓ Ready — tap to mark as watched
watch.watchInstructions: Videos must be watched for 30 seconds with this tab active to qualify. Complete {{limit}} per day to maintain commission eligibility.
watch.returnToTab: Return to this tab to continue

courseCreate.proFeatureNote: Course creation is available to Pro members ($30/mo)
courseCreate.commissionDesc: When your course sells: you keep 100% on odd sales (1st, 3rd, 5th...) and pass up even sales (2nd, 4th, 6th, 8th) to your sponsor. Your sponsor must own the same tier to receive the pass-up.

upgrade.title: ⚡ Upgrade
upgrade.subtitle: Choose your plan
upgrade.upgradeProDiff: Pay the $15 difference now. $35/mo from next renewal.
upgrade.couldNotStart: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
upgrade.basicDesc: Everything you need to start marketing and earning with AI tools.
upgrade.proDesc: Full suite of AI marketing tools plus advanced automation and leads.
upgrade.featCreativeStudio: Creative Studio — AI video, images, music & voiceover
upgrade.featLinkHub: LinkHub — your personal bio link page
upgrade.featLinkTools: Link Tools — short links, rotators, tracking
upgrade.featContentCreator: Content Creator — social posts, ad copy, video scripts
upgrade.featProfitNexus: Profit Nexus — earn from credit pack referrals
upgrade.featSuperPages: SuperPages — AI-powered landing pages and funnels
upgrade.featLeadsCRM: My Leads CRM — capture, track and nurture leads
upgrade.featCourseCreator: Course Creator — build and sell courses (coming soon)
upgrade.earnWhileGrowDesc: Refer a member and earn 50% commission — every month they stay active, or one big payout on annual billing.
upgrade.securePaymentFooter: Secure payment via USDT/USDC on Polygon or 350+ cryptos via NOWPayments · All sales are final

visualiser.title: Visualiser
visualiser.subtitle: Watch your income streams come to life
visualiser.pressPlayToWatch: Press Play to watch your team build...
visualiser.simulationDisclaimer: Simulation for educational purposes only. Actual earnings depend on personal activity and network performance. Income is not guaranteed.
visualiser.yourGridFills: Your grid fills from your entire network
visualiser.gridFillsDesc: Every person who joins anywhere in your downline fills a seat in your grid. Your direct referrals AND their referrals AND deeper — all the way down. One person, one seat, per advance.

features.linkToolsDesc: Short links, QR codes, UTM tracking

campaignTiers.title: Campaign Tiers
campaignTiers.subtitle: Activate tiers to advertise your videos and earn grid commissions
campaignTiers.heroDesc: Each tier delivers real video views through Watch & Earn. You earn commissions as your grid fills with 64 members.
campaignTiers.howItWorksDesc: Each tier gives your videos real views through the Watch & Earn network. When you activate a tier, you are placed into an 8×8 grid with 64 member positions.
campaignTiers.renewalDesc: Tiers expire once all allocated views have been delivered. To continue receiving views and earning grid commissions, simply re-activate the tier. All one-time USDT payments — no subscriptions or recurring charges.
campaignTiers.earningsDisclaimer: Earnings based on 5 personal referrals. Income may vary depending on the number of personals referred into your grid.
